name: Omegamon Alter-B

signature_move.name: Garuru Sword
signature_move.description: With the Garuru Sword on the right arm, perform a multi-hit attack.

description: The " Black Digitron " secretion, which completely turned Omegamon Alter-S black, was deliberately mixed in by someone, causing it to temporarily take on this black form. Although its power is heightened while it is in this form, it lost its sense of self, leaving it in a berserk state.
